privileged_info_summary: The task configures a Remote Simultaneous Interpreting (RSI) conference session for professionals (SOC 27-3091.00 - Interpreters and Translators). The meeting room is named 'RSI-IntlConf-2024' in Jitsi Meet running on http://localhost:8080. Jitsi Meet is deployed via Docker using stable-9753 images with ENABLE_LOBBY=1 configured for security. The meeting requires comprehensive documentation in a report file at /home/ga/Desktop/rsi_conference_report.txt. All room name, URL, and file path metadata values are accurate and verified through multiple configuration sources.
